ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the respondent */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the respondent has */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "residential_status" TEXT /* Residential status of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_use" (
  "time_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time use record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "weekly_earnings" INTEGER /* Weekly earnings of the respondent */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "weekly_hours_worked" INTEGER /* Weekly hours worked by the respondent */,
  "sleeping_id" INTEGER /* Time spent sleeping */,
  "grooming_id" INTEGER /* Time spent on grooming */,
  "housework_id" INTEGER /* Time spent on housework */,
  "food_drink_prep_id" INTEGER /* Time spent on food and drink preparation */,
  "caring_children_id" INTEGER /* Time spent caring for children */,
  "playing_children_id" INTEGER /* Time spent playing with children */,
  "job_searching_id" INTEGER /* Time spent job searching */,
  "shopping_id" INTEGER /* Time spent shopping */,
  "eating_drinking_id" INTEGER /* Time spent eating and drinking */,
  "socializing_relaxing_id" INTEGER /* Time spent socializing and relaxing */,
  "television_id" INTEGER /* Time spent watching television */,
  "golfing_id" INTEGER /* Time spent golfing */,
  "running_id" INTEGER /* Time spent running */,
  "volunteering_id" INTEGER /* Time spent volunteering */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all activities combined */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the activities */,
  "activity_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activities */,
  "activity_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_job_searching_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_searching_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_sleeping_id FOREIGN KEY ("sleeping_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_housework_id FOREIGN KEY ("housework_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_socializing_relaxing_id FOREIGN KEY ("socializing_relaxing_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_golfing_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfing_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_caring_children_id FOREIGN KEY ("caring_children_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_eating_drinking_id FOREIGN KEY ("eating_drinking_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_food_drink_prep_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_drink_prep_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_volunteering_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteering_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_grooming_id FOREIGN KEY ("grooming_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_playing_children_id FOREIGN KEY ("playing_children_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_television_id FOREIGN KEY ("television_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_running_id FOREIGN KEY ("running_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_shopping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shopping_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Indicates if the year is part of a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., mandatory, discretionary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES activity_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
